mapper.update: UPDATE user_spec_version SET is_current = FALSE WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_current = TRUE AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_spec_version (user_id, version_no, education, university, gpa, is_current, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{versionNo}, #{education}, #{university}, #{gpa}, TRUE, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user_spec_version WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_current = TRUE AND deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE user_spec_version SET deleted_at = NOW(), is_current = FALSE WHERE id = #{specVersionId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_skill (spec_version_id, skill_id, proficiency) VALUES (#{specVersionId}, #{skillId}, #{proficiency})
INSERT INTO user_certificate (spec_version_id, cert_id, status, score, acquired_at) VALUES (#{specVersionId}, #{certId}, #{status}, #{score}, #{acquiredAt})
INSERT INTO user_language_score (spec_version_id, lang_type, score, grade, acquired_at) VALUES (#{specVersionId}, #{langType}, #{score}, #{grade}, #{acquiredAt})

INSERT INTO user_intern (spec_version_id, company_name, employment_type, role, description, started_at, ended_at) VALUES (#{specVersionId}, #{companyName}, #{employmentType}, #{role}, #{description}, #{startedAt}, #{endedAt})

INSERT INTO user_project (spec_version_id, title, description, github_url, started_at, ended_at, status) VALUES (#{specVersionId}, #{title}, #{description}, #{githubUrl}, #{startedAt}, #{endedAt}, #{status})
INSERT INTO user_award (spec_version_id, title, institution, grade, awarded_at) VALUES (#{specVersionId}, #{title}, #{institution}, #{grade}, #{awardedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET password = #{password}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{userId}
UPDATE users SET name = #{name}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user_wanted_job WHERE spec_version_id = #{specVersionId}

SELECT us.id AS id, us.spec_version_id AS specVersionId, us.skill_id AS skillId, sd.name AS skillName, sd.category AS category, us.proficiency AS proficiency FROM user_skill us JOIN skill_dictionary sd ON us.skill_id = sd.id WHERE us.spec_version_id = #{specVersionId} ORDER BY sd.category ASC, sd.name ASC

SELECT uc.id AS id, uc.spec_version_id AS specVersionId, uc.cert_id AS certId, cd.name AS certName, cd.category AS category, uc.status AS status, uc.score AS score, uc.acquired_at AS acquiredAt FROM user_certificate uc JOIN cert_dictionary cd ON uc.cert_id = cd.id WHERE uc.spec_version_id = #{specVersionId} ORDER BY uc.status DESC, cd.name ASC
SELECT * FROM user_language_score WHERE spec_version_id = #{specVersionId}
SELECT id, spec_version_id, company_name, employment_type, role, description, started_at, ended_at FROM user_intern WHERE spec_version_id = #{specVersionId}
SELECT id, spec_version_id, title, description, github_url, started_at, ended_at, status FROM user_project WHERE spec_version_id = #{specVersionId}
SELECT id, spec_version_id, title, institution, grade, awarded_at FROM user_award WHERE spec_version_id = #{specVersionId}
SELECT * FROM user_spec_version WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY version_no DESC
SELECT * FROM user_spec_version WHERE id = #{specVersionId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_wanted_job WHERE spec_version_id = #{specVersionId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_skill WHERE spec_version_id = #{specVersionId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_certificate WHERE spec_version_id = #{specVersionId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_language_score WHERE spec_version_id = #{specVersionId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_intern WHERE spec_version_id = #{specVersionId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_project WHERE spec_version_id = #{specVersionId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_award WHERE spec_version_id = #{specVersionId}
